title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pearson India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pearson India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!
